_comment: Bad case 09 — REQUEST_FLIGHT_FOLLOWING on TOWER at KPAO (US). Before M6 the engine ignored the intent_frequency restriction and pushed the pilot straight into APPROACH_CONTACT + 'squawk 4527' while still tuned to Tower. The new FrequencyRule guard rejects with the configured US rejection and keeps state IDLE. Part B switches to the correct Approach frequency and the normal flow resumes.
name: Bad case 09 — flight following on Tower freq (KPAO US)

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.note: Part A — Pilot asks for flight following while still tuned to Tower
say.text: Palo Alto Tower November One Two Three Alpha Bravo two thousand five hundred VFR request flight following

say.note: Part B — switch to NORCAL Approach and retry

say.text: NORCAL Approach November One Two Three Alpha Bravo two thousand five hundred VFR request flight following
